title: New Extensibility Tools for Scripting in ImageJ
author: Gahm, Niklas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the set of sample data ( here ) and scripts ( uw-loci/ScriptingExampleForFLIMJandOps ) needed to run the protocols in the New Extensibility Tools for Scripting in ImageJ paper available at: 
- Add publication link once known 

 The Protocols and the Required Files for them are: 
Basic Protocol 1: Using PyImageJ for FLIM Processing 
-  BP1_PyImageJ.ipynb  
-  read_wiscscan_sdt.py  
-  epithelial_human_FLIM.sdt  

 Alternate Protocol 1: Groovy FLIMJ in Jupyter Notebooks 
-  AP1_FLIM_Notebook.ipynb  
-  epithelial_human_FLIM.sdt  

 Basic Protocol 2: Using ImageJ Ops for Image Deconvolution 
-  Decon_richardsonLucyTV.py  
-  HeLa_microtubules.tif   

 Support Protocol 1: Using ImageJ Ops Matching Feature for Image Inversion 
-  protocol_subprocedure_1.groovy  
-  SUM_sp2_gag_still_KIP.tif   

 Support Protocol 2: Headless ImageJ Deconvolution 
-  Decon_richardsonLucyTV_headless.py  
-  HeLa_microtubules.tif
